info.name: Autom8ion Lab API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Autom8ion Lab platform. Covers all PostgREST (database) and Edge Function endpoints across 20+ modules including CRM, automation, AI agents, social media, voice AI, and more.

Setup:
1. Import the companion environment file (autom8ion-lab.postman_environment.json)
2. Run the 'Sign In with Email/Password' request first to auto-populate bearer_token
3. Set org_id in the environment after login

item.name: 01 - Authentication
item.description: Supabase Auth endpoints for sign-in, sign-up, session management, and token refresh.

request.description: Authenticate with email and password. Returns access_token and refresh_token.
Bootstraps the first admin user for a new organization.
Creates a new user in the system with Supabase Auth account.

item.name: 02 - Contacts & CRM
item.description: Contact management, notes, tasks, timeline, tags, and custom fields.

body.raw:
{
  "contact_id": "{{contact_id}}",
  "title": "Follow up call",
  "description": "Schedule follow up after proposal review",
  "priority": "high",
  "status": "pending",
  "due_date": "2026-04-15T10:00:00Z",
  "assigned_to_user_id": "{{user_id}}",
  "created_by_user_id": "{{user_id}}"
}

item.name: 03 - Conversations & Messaging
item.description: Conversations, messages, AI drafts, conversation rules, and team messaging.

body.raw:
{
  "conversation_id": "{{conversation_id}}",
  "contact_id": "{{contact_id}}",
  "channel": "email",
  "draft_body": "Thank you for your inquiry. We would be happy to schedule a call to discuss your needs.",
  "status": "pending",
  "source": "agent",
  "generated_by_user_id": "{{user_id}}",
  "agent_id": "{{agent_id}}"
}

{
  "organization_id": "{{org_id}}",
  "name": "Greeting",
  "shortcut": "/greet",
  "content": "Hello {{contact.first_name}}, thank you for reaching out!",
  "channels": ["email", "sms"],
  "scope": "organization",
  "is_enabled": true,
  "created_by_user_id": "{{user_id}}"
}

item.name: 04 - Opportunities & Pipelines
item.description: Pipeline management, opportunity tracking, stage history, and lost reasons.

body.raw:
{
  "organization_id": "{{org_id}}",
  "opportunity_id": "{{opportunity_id}}",
  "contact_id": "{{contact_id}}",
  "body": "Client is interested in the enterprise plan.",
  "created_by": "{{user_id}}"
}

item.name: 05 - Payments & Invoicing
item.description: Products, invoices, payments, recurring profiles, payment reminders, and QBO integration.

item.name: 06 - Proposals & Contracts
item.description: Proposal creation, line items, sections, comments, activities, signatures, and contract management.

body.raw:
{ "organization_id": "{{org_id}}", "contact_id": "{{contact_id}}", "title": "Web Development Proposal", "content": "

Scope of work...

", "summary": "Full-stack web application development", "total_value": 15000.00, "currency": "USD", "valid_until": "2026-05-30", "created_by": "{{user_id}}", "status": "draft" }

item.name: 07 - Calendars & Scheduling
item.description: Calendars, appointment types, appointments, availability, blocked slots, booking API, and Google Calendar.

item.name: 08 - Projects
item.description: Project management, tasks, notes, costs, files, activity log, and project pipelines.

body.raw:
{
  "organization_id": "{{org_id}}",
  "project_id": "{{project_id}}",
  "title": "Design mockups",
  "description": "Create UI mockups for all pages",
  "status": "todo",
  "priority": "high",
  "assigned_user_id": "{{user_id}}",
  "due_date": "2026-04-15",
  "created_by": "{{user_id}}"
}

item.name: 09 - Automation & Workflows
item.description: Workflow management, enrollment, execution, condition evaluation, scheduled/webhook triggers, templates, and approvals.

body.raw:
{
  "organization_id": "{{org_id}}",
  "name": "Welcome New Contacts",
  "description": "Send welcome email when new contact is created",
  "status": "draft",
  "trigger_type": "contact_created",
  "trigger_config": {},
  "definition": {"nodes": [], "edges": []},
  "created_by": "{{user_id}}"
}

item.name: 10 - AI Agents
item.description: AI agent management, knowledge collections, prompt templates, guardrails, AI reports, LLM models, and usage logs.

body.raw:
{
  "organization_id": "{{org_id}}",
  "name": "Sales Assistant",
  "description": "AI agent for handling sales inquiries",
  "system_prompt": "You are a helpful sales assistant.",
  "model_id": "",
  "enabled": true,
  "agent_type": "conversational",
  "created_by": "{{user_id}}"
}

{
  "organization_id": "{{org_id}}",
  "name": "Email Reply Template",
  "content": "Compose a professional reply to: {{message}}",
  "category": "communication",
  "status": "active"
}

item.name: 11 - Social Media & Marketing
item.description: Social accounts, posts, campaigns, guidelines, AI content, comments, metrics, account groups, and brandboard.

item.name: 12 - Reputation & Reviews
item.description: Reviews, review requests, review providers, reputation reviews, reputation settings, AI analysis, and routing rules.

item.name: 13 - Forms, Surveys & Scoring
item.description: Forms, form submissions, surveys, survey submissions, tags, and lead/engagement scoring.

body.raw:
{
  "organization_id": "{{org_id}}",
  "name": "Contact Us Form",
  "description": "Main website contact form",
  "status": "draft",
  "definition": {"fields": []},
  "settings": {"contactMatching": "email_first", "honeypotEnabled": true},
  "created_by": "{{user_id}}"
}

item.name: 14 - Reporting & Analytics
item.description: AI-powered reports, report schedules, dashboard analytics, content AI analytics, and system health checks.

item.name: 15 - File Management & Google Drive
item.description: Google Drive integration, file management, drive connections, and file attachments.

item.name: 16 - Communications
item.description: Gmail integration, email services (SendGrid), SMS messaging, phone system (Twilio), and Google Chat.

item.name: 17 - Voice AI (VAPI)
item.description: VAPI voice assistants, calls, sessions, phone numbers, tools, widgets, analytics, and conversations.

item.name: 18 - Administration
item.description: Users, organizations, departments, roles, permissions, feature flags, audit logs, and staff management.

item.name: 19 - Integrations & Webhooks
item.description: Integration catalog, connections, outgoing webhooks, webhook deliveries, Google OAuth, and portal authentication.

item.name: 20 - System & Utilities
item.description: Notifications, user profile/preferences, custom values, Clara assistant (chat, voice, memory), meetings, and Google Calendar sync.
